title: lippia balansae
intro: Lippia balansae, also known as Balansa's lippia, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Asia, belonging to the verbena family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from respiratory issues. Lippia balansae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
